scripts.build: pnpm run build:js && pnpm run build:types
scripts.build:js: esbuild src/components/Progress.tsx src/index.ts src/jsx-runtime.ts src/general_types.ts src/anta_helpers.ts src/elements/index.ts src/elements/a-progress.ts --outdir=dist --outbase=src --jsx=automatic --jsx-import-source=anta --format=esm --target=ES2022 --loader:.module.css=local-css --loader:.css=global-css
